# Bug Report

## Summary

Write one clear sentence describing what is going wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

Write the exact steps someone else would follow to see this bug happen.

Step 1.
Step 2.
Step 3.

## Expected Behaviour

Describe what should have happened if the system was working correctly.

## Actual Behaviour

Describe what actually happened instead.

## Screenshots or Error Messages

Paste any error messages or attach screenshots here if available.

## Environment

| Field            |         Details              |

| Browser          | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 115 |
| Operating System | e.g. Windows 11, macOS Ventura |
| User Role        | e.g. Employee, Admin, Receptionist, Facilities Manager |
| Date and Time of Issue | e.g. 2026-05-13 at 14:30 |

## How Often Does This Happen

Every time / Sometimes / Only happened once

## Additional Context

Add anything else that might help someone understand or reproduce the issue. Include the related story number if you know it.
